sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52185" key="kakoergi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-εργία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-εργός</orth>, <sense id="n52185.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κακουργία, -γος</ref></xr>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> sub vocc.</sense> </entryFree>
